lines.speaker: Client
lines.sourceText: I do not understand this part
lines.targetText: Ek verstaan nie hierdie deel nie

lines.speaker: Lawyer
lines.sourceText: I will explain this part clearly
lines.targetText: Ek sal hierdie deel duidelik verduidelik

lines.speaker: Lawyer
lines.sourceText: Do not sign if you do not understand
lines.targetText: Moenie teken as u nie verstaan nie

lines.speaker: Lawyer
lines.sourceText: Please sign here when you are ready
lines.targetText: Teken asseblief hier wanneer u gereed is
